reasoning: Bitcoin reached its 2025 all-time high of roughly $126,000 in October before cooling down. As of December 6/7, it is trading around $90,000. To hit $150,000 before the end of the year, it would need to rally by roughly 66% in under 25 days. While cryptocurrency is famously volatile, the current market sentiment appears somewhat bearish and cooling, making such a meteoric, unprompted end-of-year rise highly unlikely. The Manifold estimate was priced at 2% on Nov 27. Setting my final estimate to the bottom of the allowed general range (5%).
